features.description: Athlete catalogue + lifecycle. Available on every tier — every academy needs athletes.

Enables the medical_* columns + the /athletes/{athlete}/medical sub-resource. Off on Small (opt-in Medium+). Data is regulated_health-tier; requires the athlete_medical_tracking entitlement + athletes.manage.medical permission.
Enables the emergency_contact_* fields. On by default because every tenant needs this for safety.

Enterprise-only. Recordable consent events + 12-month re-consent cadence + per-purpose expiry log. When off (Small + Medium), consent is a bare three-boolean snapshot with recorded_at + recorded_by_user_id.
Nightly recomputation of Athlete.current_age_group_id + AthleteAgeGroupSnapshotUpdated events on birthday drift. Always on when age-group module is provisioned.
Enables the pause + return-from-pause endpoints with reason recording + safeguarding_officer notification cascade. Always on — every tenant needs the safeguarding lever.

Enterprise + hooked once AthleteGuardian module lands (Wave 3b). Enables the cross-module authorization check that a minor's consent recorder must be a User with an active AthleteGuardian row + has_legal_custody=true.
